description: The finding already states: 'The previous highest-n full table in the literature is for n=19 [Baldoni-Bergvelt-van Willigenburg, Exp. Math., 2006]; we are not aware of any published S_20 or S_30 tables.' This directly cites the highest-n full table and clarifies no larger ones are known.
action_taken: Reviewer concern already addressed in finding text. Marked resolved.
